status_meanings.restored-draft: Readable restored translation exists, but source-audit metadata is incomplete.
status_meanings.source-audited-draft: Verse-by-verse source-language review has been applied for major wording, grammar, context, and interpretive choices. Final scholarly review may still refine details.
status_meanings.source-critical: Textual variants and manuscript witnesses have also been reviewed where relevant.

chapters.notes: Embedded audit_status added. Re-audited major Hebrew terms and high-risk translation choices, including bereshit, bara, elohim, tohu/bohu, ruach, raqia, moedim, mashal, adam, tselem/demut, radah, kabash, nephesh chayyah, and tov meod.
Added with source-aware review of YHWH Elohim, adam/adamah, nephesh chayyah, ezer kenegdo, tsela, ish/ishshah, avad/shamar, and shame/body language.
Added with source-aware review of nachash, arum/arom wordplay, elohim ambiguity, tov/ra, ayeka, arar, teshuqah/mashal, mortality, and guarded tree-of-life language.

Added with source-aware review of Cain/Abel, qanah, hevel, minchah, chattat crouching at the doorway, teshuqah/mashal echo, blood crying from the ground, Cain's sign, Lamech's vengeance, and Seth/Enosh restoration line.

next_actions: Continue Genesis 4-11 batch with Genesis 5 restored source-audited draft and mystical companion.
Add glossary files for recurring terms introduced in Genesis 1-4.
Later promote chapters to source-critical after textual variant and manuscript witness review.
